message:
feat(fwc): add real-time surface truth and pipeline/workflow execution truth types

Add RealtimeSurfaceMode, AuditTailSource, ToolCallBackingState enums
with resolution functions for honest reporting of surface liveness.
Add PipelineStageOutcome, PipelineTruthSummary, TaskProgressSource,
and WorkflowExecutionTruth types with builders and JSON payload
converters. Expand test suite from ~27 to ~103 tests covering new
types and auth denial flows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
